math_definition: cap * tanh(x / cap) where cap is a positive float scalar parameter (default 50.0)

ranking_rationale: swish=exact custom ckernel_sfpu pattern from scratch with polynomial approx (sigmoid/tanh primitives nuked, so swish shows how to rebuild from SFPI); tanhshrink=directly uses tanh_tile showing the kernel-level tanh integration pattern; atanh=custom ckernel_sfpu with polynomial log approximation and vConstFloatPrgm init, directly shows how to implement inverse-tanh class of approximation; sinh=exp_21f helper and exp-composition pattern reusable for tanh-via-exp formula; hardtanh=parameterized op with scalar cap pattern showing s2vFloat16b parameter loading and is_parametrized_type dispatch
